backend.changelog: Co-release with CadBridge 1.8.82 — large-assembly 3D PDF auto-resumes after a SolidWorks restart.

cadBridge.changelog: 3D PDF on large assemblies now survives a SolidWorks COM drop: the app restarts SolidWorks and resumes the remaining 3D PDFs automatically (no re-collect, no crash) and auto-dismisses the launcher prompts, so the export completes unattended.
